taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Want to learn something? Sorry. These days the bandits are getting rampant. I don't have the time for teaching. But there is a man called Freddie. He can teach you many skills. Why don't you go and find him!

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I forgot my way home. Can you take me back to my mother?

taskAddEntries.text2: Really?#1[26]You'll really take me back home?

taskAwardEntries.text: You came back finally! Thank you so much!#1[35]
Honey, Where did you go? Your Mum misses you so much.#1[24]

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡You are lucky to run into me today! I'm hard up these days. You'll get an unexpected prize if you send me some coins!
¡¡¡¡You are lucky to run into me today! I'm hard up these days. You'll get an unexpected prize if you send me some coins!

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I'm a mother! I can't just stand and do nothing cuz my babies are suffering starvation at home! All that I do is not on purpose! I have my own reason!

taskAddEntries.text1: Can you see that far at there?

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I'm a mother! I can't just stand and do nothing cuz my babies are suffering starvation at home! All that I do is not on purpose! I have my own reason!

taskAwardEntries.text: I was too much worried! Sorry!

taskAddEntries.text1: Babies~be quiet~Mun will get you some food!
taskAddEntries.text2: My babies should not suffer starvation but for your disturbance!

It's so kind of you sending this to me.

taskAddEntries.text2: It bothers the Pub Owner a lot! He comes to me for his treasure every day!

Help me find out the material of making that sword~

taskAddEntries.text2: Good guys.

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡I need some unique and precious spider silks. Can you get some for me? I'll pay you!
¡¡¡¡I need some unique and precious spider silks. Can you get some for me? I'll pay you!

taskAddEntries.text1: There are precious treasures and a belle far away from here~

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Everytime I went to the sea, I would pump into those horrible Thorny Tortoises. Our fishing boats are broken. Please help us destroy them!

taskTalkEntries.text: ¡¡¡¡Everytime I went to the sea, I would pump into those horrible Thorny Tortoises. Our fishing boats are broken. Please help us destroy them!

No hurt! No hurt! Everything is OK!

taskAddEntries.text2: Be careful! Please bring me my Little Golden Tortoise!

taskAwardEntries.text: You must help me! It all depends on you!
